LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT BENEFIT COSMETICS, L.L.C.'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND IN TEN DAYS AS TO FIRST AND FOURTH CAUSES OF ACTION. IF PLAINTIFF SEEKS PUNITIVE DAMAGES, PLAINTIFF MUST ALLEGE FACTS THAT SUPPORT THE CLAIM. AS TO THE FOURTH CAUSE OF ACTION, PLAINTIFF MUST DECIDE WHETHER PLAINTIFF SEEKS RELIEF UNDER 17200 OR 17500 AND PLEAD FACTS THAT SUPPORT THE CLAIM. SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE SECOND AND THIRD CAUSES OF ACTION. AS TO THE THIRD CAUSE OF ACTION, PLAINTIFF CONSENTED TO BEING TOUCHED AND HENCE, DOES NOT HAVE A CLAIM FOR BATTERY. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT BENEFIT COSMETICS, L.L.C.'S MOTION TO STRIKE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: GRANTED WITH TEN DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600
